title: IA + TFG Integration
description: Immersive Aircraft and Man of Many Planes integration mod for the TerraFirmaGreg modpack
body:
# IA TFG Integration
[Immersive Aircraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft) and [Man of Many Planes](https://modrinth.com/mod/man-of-many-planes) integration mod for the [TerraFirmaGreg](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/terrafirmagreg-modern) modpack.

Original recipes from [IA TFC Compatibility](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ia-tfc-compatibility). Done some heavy modifications to many of the recipes plus removed the default ones so it is better integrated with the modpack.

## TODO
- [X] Improve recipes
- [X] Add more compatibility maybe with Create for the TFG modpack since it has already a boiler and propeller
- [X] Add more compatibility with TFG maybe used the tools from the modpack in the recipes
- [X] Do something with the nether engine recipe
- [X] Integrate Man of Many Planes

# Distribution and modpacks
The distribution of this mod can only be done through Modrinth. You can only include the mod in a modpack if the launcher automatically downloads it through the Modrinth API. If you cannot do that then the user will have to download it manually.
